'''thomakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbinical|rabbinical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbinical|rabbinical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thomakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomakithi|thomakithi]] || [[word:thomakiji|thomakiji]] || [[word:thomakishi|thomakishi]] || [[word:thomakiki|thomakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomakuthuthu|thomakuthuthu]] || [[word:thomakujuju|thomakujuju]] || [[word:thomakushushu|thomakushushu]] || [[word:thomakukuku|thomakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomakuthu|thomakuthu]] || [[word:thomakuju|thomakuju]] || [[word:thomakushu|thomakushu]] || [[word:thomakuku|thomakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomakufthuf|thomakufthuf]] || [[word:thomakufjuf|thomakufjuf]] || [[word:thomakufshuf|thomakufshuf]] || [[word:thomakufkuf|thomakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomakethe|thomakethe]] || [[word:thomakeje|thomakeje]] || [[word:thomakeshe|thomakeshe]] || [[word:thomakeke|thomakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomakothotho|thomakothotho]] || [[word:thomakojojo|thomakojojo]] || [[word:thomakoshosho|thomakoshosho]] || [[word:thomakokoko|thomakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomakotho|thomakotho]] || [[word:thomakojo|thomakojo]] || [[word:thomakosho|thomakosho]] || [[word:thomakoko|thomakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomakofthof|thomakofthof]] || [[word:thomakofjof|thomakofjof]] || [[word:thomakofshof|thomakofshof]] || [[word:thomakofkof|thomakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomakïfthïf|thomakïfthïf]] || [[word:thomakïfjïf|thomakïfjïf]] || [[word:thomakïfshïf|thomakïfshïf]] || [[word:thomakïfkïf|thomakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomakïfthïfthïf|thomakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thomakïfjïfjïf|thomakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thomakïfshïfshïf|thomakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thomakïfkïfkïf|thomakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomakïfthïf|thomakïfthïf]] || [[word:thomakïfjïf|thomakïfjïf]] || [[word:thomakïfshïf|thomakïfshïf]] || [[word:thomakïfkïf|thomakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomakïfthïf|thomakïfthïf]] || [[word:thomakïfjïf|thomakïfjïf]] || [[word:thomakïfshïf|thomakïfshïf]] || [[word:thomakïfkïf|thomakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thomakæthæ|thomakæthæ]] || [[word:thomakæjæ|thomakæjæ]] || [[word:thomakæshæ|thomakæshæ]] || [[word:thomakækæ|thomakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thomakathatha|thomakathatha]] || [[word:thomakajaja|thomakajaja]] || [[word:thomakashasha|thomakashasha]] || [[word:thomakakaka|thomakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomakatha|thomakatha]] || [[word:thomakaja|thomakaja]] || [[word:thomakasha|thomakasha]] || [[word:thomakaka|thomakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomakafthaf|thomakafthaf]] || [[word:thomakafjaf|thomakafjaf]] || [[word:thomakafshaf|thomakafshaf]] || [[word:thomakafkaf|thomakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thomakasha|thomakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomakshësha|thomakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomakrosha|thomakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomakmusha|thomakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomakyasha|thomakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomaknkshësha|gothomaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomaknkrosha|gothomaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomaknkmusha|gothomaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomaknkyasha|gothomaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thomamakasha|thomamakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomamakshësha|thomamakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomamakrosha|thomamakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomamakmusha|thomamakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomamakyasha|thomamakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomamaknkshësha|gothomamaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomamaknkrosha|gothomamaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomamaknkmusha|gothomamaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomamaknkyasha|gothomamaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:themækasha|themækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:themækshësha|themækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:themækrosha|themækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:themækmusha|themækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:themækyasha|themækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothemæknkshësha|gothemæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothemæknkrosha|gothemæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothemæknkmusha|gothemæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothemæknkyasha|gothemæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thomfakasha|thomfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thomfakshësha|thomfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thomfakrosha|thomfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thomfakmusha|thomfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thomfakyasha|thomfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothomfaknkshësha|gothomfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothomfaknkrosha|gothomfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothomfaknkmusha|gothomfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothomfaknkyasha|gothomfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
